entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00120) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION ADDS CLIN 10004A, "STOWAGE CRADLE INCLUDING SHIPPING" AT $16,377 EACH TO SECTION B AND REVISES SECTIONS C AND F ACCORDINGLY. ALSO, REVISES SECTION I, CLAUSE 3052.215-70 KEY PERSONNEL OR FACILITIES. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00121) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION ADDS SUBCLINS 10003GC&10003HC FOR POST AWARD CHANGES TO FOREIGN MILITARY SALES (FMS) HULLS FOR JORDAN AND BAHRAIN IN SECTION B AND ADDS CHANGE LANGUAGE MODIFYING THE APPLICABLE SPECIFICATION REQUIREMENTS RELATED TO FMS HULLS IN SECTION J AS A SUPPLEMENT TO ATTACHMENT 2. THE CHANGES INCORPORATED BY THIS MODIFICATION ARE APPLICABLE TO THE JORDAN AND BAHRAIN HULL CONFIGURATION. ALL OTHER TERMS AND CONDITIONS REMAIN UNCHANGED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00122) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCREASES SUBCLIN 10003GC AND DECREASES SUBCLIN 10003HC FOR POST AWARD CHANGES TO FOREIGN MILITARY SALES (FMS) HULLS FOR JORDAN AND BAHRAIN IN SECTION B AND ADDS CHANGE LANGUAGE MODIFYING THE APPLICABLE SPECIFICATION REQUIREMENTS RELATED TO FMS HULLS IN SECTION J AS A SUPPLEMENT TO ATTACHMENT 2.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC HSCG2306DARB001 (A00129) awarded to MARINETTE MARINE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: ORDER DEPENDENT (IDV ALLOWS PRICING ARRANGEMENT TO BE DETERMINED SEPARATELY FOR EACH ORDER)

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THIS MODIFICATION INCREASES SUBCLIN 10003HC FOR POST AWARD CHANGES TO FOREIGN MILITARY SALES (FMS) HULLS FOR BAHRAIN, ADDS SUBCLIN 10003HP FOR BC-18 ELECTRICAL CHANGE AND RAISES THE CEILING FOR CLIN 10007B.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
